highlights.text: I wrote in my Monday October 7th newsletter: “Bull case tomorrow: No change.
I wrote Thursday at 4pm: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend.

I wrote in my Monday 4pm newsletter: “Bear case tomorrow: For tomorrow, a short term dip may evolve below 5893-95”, and we got a 70 point flush yesterday into today which was the largest sell since October 7th.
My general lean is that ES tries to backtest some of the breakdown zones from today…From there, we head to 5883, then 5902”.

post_title: Is The PullBack Already Done In SPX? Not So Fast. October 17 Plan
